description: Integration of revenue-generating features, search engine optimization, and advanced analytics for business success.
best_practices: Include proper, descriptive title tags and meta descriptions for SEO.
Implement Stripe Checkout or LemonSqueezy for secure payments and subscriptions.
Use a single <h1> per page with proper heading hierarchy (h1 -> h2 -> h3).
Enable SEO-friendly dynamic routing and canonical URLs.
Integrate PostHog or Google Analytics for advanced event tracking.
Optimize Core Web Vitals for search engine ranking (LCP, FID, CLS).
Add OG tags for rich social media sharing in OpenGraph metadata.

business_rules.stripe_secret: Never leak secret keys; use environment variables.
